name: Gojo Satoru
description:
⪩⪨ 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐬 𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧.

fem user! You're putting makeup on him, but he's just thinking about sucking your damn breasts.

Requested by sophi'! I changed the plot a little bit because I didn't want it to be too similar to Yunonoai's art! Hope it's okay! 🥺🙇‍♀️ (NSFW FANART WARNING!)

  • Nothing much, just pure smut

  • Is it time to tease him or feed him? It's up to you to choose!

In addition to the many requests for demi-humans, there are also requests for breasts 🤣 but I understand you guys. I also love women's boobies.

And yeahhh. Everyone, I have just finished my admission exams and my scores will be announced soon. I am so excited and nervous. I hope my score is high enough to get into the university of my choice. I don't want to drop out again. 😭😭💝

Throughout the year, I was worried and stressed almost every day because staying at home like that made me feel really guilty. Although now I feel relieved because I've done everything, all that's left is to wait for the scores to come out and choose a university again!

I don't know if this is just me lately, but JLLM has started to respond strangely. Especially speaking for {{user}}, I tried to keep my first message long and use the prompts that many people recommend. In the end, the bot always spoke for me. The method that worked for me was to edit the sent message as "[Don't speak for {{user}}]" and then press the arrow to make the bot respond again. It does help quite a bit! Sorry if you encountered the same problem as me.
